# openai_invite (Data Source)

Look up an organization invite by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_invite" "example" {
  invite_id = "invite_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `invite_id` (String) invite id

### Read-Only

- `accepted_at` (Number) accepted at
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `email` (String) email
- `expires_at` (Number) expires at
- `id` (String) id
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `role` (String) role
- `status` (String) status
